data_types: Customs tariffs (MFN, applied, general, preferential rates)
Trade agreements (400+ bilateral and multilateral agreements)
Trade flows and market access data
data_overview.product_classification: HS codes (Harmonized System) with national tariff line breakdowns

features.access_module: Query customs tariffs, trade remedies, regulatory requirements
features.compare_module: Comparative analysis across markets, competitors, and products
features.analyse_module: Trade agreement information, GTAP tariffs, market access graphs
features.download_section: Bulk data export in customized formats

download_capabilities.description: Bulk download data on applied tariffs and GTAP tariff protection databases
download_capabilities.access_requirement: Free registration required for full functionality
download_capabilities.custom_query_downloads: Users can download results from query interface

api_status.notes: No publicly documented REST API or developer API endpoints found
api_status.api_inquiries: Contact ITC directly for potential API access

known_working_urls.description: Main portal with navigation to all modules
Main query interface for accessing tariff data
Download section for bulk data (may require login)
Specialized interface for customs duties queries

data_availability.verification_tool: Data Availability module on main site
data_availability.coverage: Customs tariffs, tariff rate quotas, trade remedies, regulatory requirements, trade flows
data_availability.note: Not all indicators available for all countries and years

contact_information.organization: International Trade Centre - Trade and Market Intelligence unit

key_findings.strength: Comprehensive global tariff database with 200+ countries, multiple data types, and comparative analysis tools
key_findings.limitation: No public API documentation; bulk download requires navigating web interface and may need registration
key_findings.accessibility: Free access for basic queries; full functionality requires account creation
key_findings.data_quality: Official ITC data with recognized methodology; regularly updated

recommended_next_steps: Create account at https://www.macmap.org/ to access full download features
Navigate to Data Availability tool to verify specific country-year coverage
Use query interface for specific tariff lookups by country and product
Contact ITC directly for bulk data extracts and API access requests
Check if GTAP tariff databases are available for download
Explore trade agreement module for preferential rate information

data_access_workflow.step_1: Visit https://www.macmap.org/ and create free account
data_access_workflow.step_2: Use 'Access' module for customs tariffs queries
data_access_workflow.step_3: Select destination country and exporting country
data_access_workflow.step_4: Search by product (HS code or name) and tariff year
data_access_workflow.step_5: View results with applied, MFN, and preferential rates
data_access_workflow.step_6: Export/download individual query results as Excel or charts
data_access_workflow.step_7: For bulk data, navigate to 'Download' section with account

limitations_encountered: Cannot directly download full tariff schedules via public URLs without web interface
Documentation pages (methodology, full country list) returning 404 errors
No REST API for programmatic access
Specific country-year coverage details not accessible without interactive tool
Some download features may require authentication/registration
alternative_access_recommendations: Contact marketanalysis@intracen.org for bulk data requests
Request tariff extracts by country and year from ITC directly
Inquire about GTAP tariff database availability
Ask about historical tariff data and time-series extracts
